globalRule.bigQueryRuleExpression: SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN first_name = CAST(date_of_joining AS STRING) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS invalid,
globalRule.expression: SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN first_name = CAST(date_of_joining AS STRING) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS invalid, SUM(CASE WHEN first_name = CAST(date_of_joining AS STRING) THEN 0 ELSE 1 END) AS valid FROM (SELECT first_name, date_of_joining FROM databuckk8s.new_data_set.BV_TEST_DATA) valid_invalid_scenario

globalRule.bigQueryRuleExpression: SELECT SUM(Valid) AS passed, SUM(Invalid) AS failed
globalRule.expression: SELECT SUM(Valid) AS passed, SUM(Invalid) AS failed FROM (SELECT CASE WHEN Last_name IS NULL OR LOWER(TRIM(Last_name)) = 'null' OR TRIM(Last_name) = '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS Invalid, CASE WHEN Last_name IS NULL OR LOWER(TRIM(Last_name)) = 'null' OR TRIM(Last_name) = '' THEN 0 ELSE 1 END AS Valid FROM databuckk8s.new_data_set.BV_TEST_DATA) valid_invalid_scenario
